description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, cylindrical barrel. The frame is streamlined, with a prominent, ergonomic pistol grip that appears textured for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with no visible ribbing or venting, giving the weapon a tactical, close-quarters appearance. The receiver and grip are integrated smoothly, and there is no visible stock extending from the rear, suggesting a design optimized for maneuverability. The overall construction appears solid and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a thick barrel and ergonomic pistol grip, designed for tactical use and close-quarters handling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the thick barrel, ergonomic pistol grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the grip and barrel profile clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the muzzle opening, the width of the barrel, and the front profile of the grip and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, large, and smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
